title: Kenyan-Style Stir Fry
description: A flavorful Kenyan-inspired stir fry dish made with a variety of vegetables and spices. This recipe is perfect for a quick and easy weeknight dinner.

ingredients.name: frozen vegetables
ingredients.notes: such as broccoli, carrots, bell peppers

instructions: Heat the fryer oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the garlic and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the frozen vegetables and cook until they start to thaw.
Pour in the stir-fry sauce and add the Kenyan spices.
Stir everything together and continue to cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, until the vegetables are tender.
